variants.name: 代言人
variants.ability: 每个夜晚，你要选择一名存活玩家：如果他明天白天被处决，你会在当晚得知一名与他阵营相同的玩家。
variants.firstNightReminder: Wake the Advocate. They will choose a player. Mark that player with the "Chosen" reminder token. Then, put the Advocate to sleep.
variants.otherNightReminder: Wake the Advocate. If a player has the "Executed Today" reminder token on them, point at a player of the same alignment as them. Then, the Advocate will choose a player. Mark that player with the "Chosen" reminder token. Then, put the Advocate to sleep.
variants.flavor: To play Devil's Advocate here though...
